title: Christmas Cat Toy Set of 3 with Catnip – Festive Plush Carrot, Brussels Sprout & Turkey Drumstick with Crinkle & String Arms – 7–10cm Interactive Holiday Toys for Cats & Kittens
features: Set of 3 festive cat toys including carrot, Brussels sprout, and turkey drumstick designs, adding seasonal fun and variety to your cat’s toy collection.
Each toy is infused with catnip to encourage natural hunting behaviours, stimulating your cat’s senses and providing hours of active festive entertainment.
Measuring approx. 7–10cm, these lightweight plush toys are perfectly sized for batting, chasing, pouncing, and carrying, suitable for cats and kittens alike.
Features multi-sensory elements including a crinkle effect on the carrot and dangling string arms and legs on all toys to keep cats engaged and curious.
Bright, cheerful designs make them a fun Christmas gift or stocking filler, combining durability, play value, and holiday spirit in one playful set.
description: Product Description Purr-fectly Festive Fun for Playful Cats Keep your cat active and entertained this Christmas with our festive toy collection. Designed to spark curiosity and encourage play, each toy offers fun textures and sounds to chase, bat, and pounce on—bringing endless joy and festive energy to your feline friend. Festive Fun for Curious Cats Keep your cat playful and active with this festive wand toy, featuring catnip, feathers, and crinkle sounds for endless Christmas entertainment. Bounce, Swat & Play All Day Keep your cat active with this festive spring toy. With catnip, feathers, and bounce, it encourages natural hunting fun and endless festive play. Festive Fun in Every Pounce Delight your cat with this set of three festive toys. Each includes catnip, soft textures, and pom-pom limbs for playful batting, chasing, and fun. Crackling Christmas Fun Treat your cat to festive play with this set of three catnip cracker toys, featuring crinkle sound, ribbons, and soft textures for Christmas fun. A Festive Feast of Fun Delight your cat with this set of three dinner-themed toys featuring catnip, crinkle sound, and dangling legs for festive batting and chasing fun. Holiday Playtime, Purrfected Keep your cat entertained with this set of three catnip toys, featuring crinkle sound, soft textures, and fluffy tails for festive chasing fun. Vibrant Vibration Play Keep your cat active with this set of three vibrating bauble toys. Each moves unpredictably to excite natural instincts and festive playtime fun. Pick Your Festive Toy Catnip crackers, jingling baubles, spring swatters and more—find the toy that gets your cat pouncing, chasing and playing all Christmas.
